import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  mut sum = 0
  mut running = true
  while running
    match io.read_line()
    when None
      running = false
    when Some(line)
      let trimmed = string.trim(line)
      if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
        let tokens = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
        if tokens.len() >= 2
          match tokens.get(1)
          when Some(tok)
            match string.parse_int(tok)
            when Some(n)
              sum = sum + n
            when None
            end
          when None
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
  print("sum=#{sum}")
  Ok(())
end
